overview: AI Code Review Assistant — a full-stack web app that lets users paste code in any programming language and receive instant AI-powered feedback including bug detection, improvement suggestions, code explanations, best practices recommendations, and a quality score. Designed for professional demos and academic presentations.
features: Syntax-highlighted code editor with 15+ language support
AI-powered analysis via HTTP outcalls (bug detection, improvements, explanation, best practices)
Code quality score with color-coded visual indicator
Sample code examples for quick testing
Dark/light theme toggle with localStorage persistence
